zh.lifeSummary: Rose DeHalesworth是Thomas Halesworth和Mrs Thomas Halesworth的女兒，於1146年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯。她於1160年與Reginald de Argentine在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1181年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: Rose DeHalesworth was born in 1146, in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Thomas Halesworth and Mrs Thomas Halesworth. She married Reginald de Argentine in 1160, in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1181, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Rose DeHalesworth est née en 1146, à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Thomas Halesworth et Mrs Thomas Halesworth. Elle a épousé Reginald de Argentine en 1160, à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1181, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose DeHalesworthは1146年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルスでThomas HalesworthとMrs Thomas Halesworthの娘として生まれた。1160年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルスでReginald de Argentineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1181年にフランスピカーディソンメで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose DeHalesworth(은)는 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스에서 Thomas Halesworth(와)과 Mrs Thomas Halesworth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스에서 Reginald de Argentine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1181년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Rose DeHalesworth родилась в 1146 г. в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Thomas Halesworth и Mrs Thomas Halesworth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald de Argentine в 1160 г. в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1181 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 35 лет.
